title: Fixture: Accessible Agency Web Modernization
sourceText:
SAMPLE FIXTURE — FOR DEMONSTRATION ONLY

Solicitation No. 47QTCA-26-Q-0142. The General Services Administration seeks a small business contractor to modernize an internal acquisition knowledge website. NAICS 541512 applies. This acquisition is a total small business set-aside. Questions are due August 4, 2026 at 3:00 PM Eastern, and quotations are due August 14, 2026 at 3:00 PM Eastern. The anticipated contract type is firm-fixed-price with a twelve-month base period and one twelve-month option.

The contractor shall conduct discovery interviews, deliver a content inventory, create an information architecture, and implement a responsive website using the agency-approved content management system. The contractor shall migrate approximately 800 pages and shall provide administrator training and operations documentation. All public-facing and internal electronic content must conform to the Revised Section 508 Standards. The contractor must deliver an Accessibility Conformance Report using the current VPAT format and remediate all critical findings before launch.

Quotations must include separate technical, management, past-performance, and price volumes. The technical volume is limited to 20 pages, the management volume to 10 pages, and resumes are excluded from those limits. Files must be submitted as searchable PDF documents by email. The Government will evaluate technical approach, management approach, past performance, and price in descending order of importance. Offerors must provide three recent and relevant references. Key personnel include a project manager and accessibility lead; resumes and signed letters of commitment are required. The contractor shall comply with FAR 52.204-7, FAR 52.204-21, FAR 52.204-25, and FAR 52.219-14.
